---
title: Product Demo
description: A full 45s product-demo clip — serif type acts, an orbiting app-icon cloud, product UIs, animated task cards, a focus chart, integrations, metric cards, and testimonials
---

<ComponentPreview name="a1-product-demo" />

A complete 1920x1080 product demo built as one seek-safe Remotion timeline (1356 frames at 30fps). Twelve acts play back to back over a warm cream canvas with serif display type and a yellow accent. A typed `ProductDemo` config path is also exported for building your own scene sequence.

## Installation

<InstallBlock name="a1-product-demo" />

## Usage

Render the built-in example straight away — it ships the default `Switchboard` config:

```tsx
// src/Root.tsx
import { Composition } from "remotion";
import {
  A1ProductDemo,
  DEFAULT_PRODUCT_DEMO_CONFIG,
  getProductDemoDuration,
} from "@/components/remocn/a1-product-demo";

const ProductDemoScene = () => (
  <A1ProductDemo accentColor="#6366F1" background="dynamic-grid" theme="dark" />
);

export const RemotionRoot = () => (
  <Composition
    id="ProductDemo"
    component={ProductDemoScene}
    durationInFrames={getProductDemoDuration(DEFAULT_PRODUCT_DEMO_CONFIG)}
    fps={30}
    width={1920}
    height={1080}
  />
);
```

### With your own config

Drive the template from a typed, serializable config. Add as many `feature-frame` scenes as you need — sides alternate, transitions adapt, and `getProductDemoDuration` keeps the composition length correct.

```tsx
// src/Root.tsx
import { Composition } from "remotion";
import {
  A1ProductDemo,
  getProductDemoDuration,
  type ProductDemoConfig,
} from "@/components/remocn/a1-product-demo";

const config: ProductDemoConfig = {
  meta: { fps: 30, width: 1920, height: 1080 },
  theme: {
    accent: "#6366F1",
    background: "#0B0B0F",
    foreground: "#FAFAFA",
    muted: "rgba(250,250,250,0.55)",
    fontFamily: "Geist",
  },
  scenes: [
    {
      type: "product-hero",
      durationInFrames: 150,
      content: { name: "Switchboard", pitch: "One inbox for every channel" },
    },
    {
      type: "feature-frame",
      durationInFrames: 180,
      content: { title: "Unified inbox", bullet: "Email, chat and SMS in one stream", side: "left" },
    },
    {
      type: "feature-frame",
      durationInFrames: 180,
      content: { title: "Auto routing", bullet: "Every message reaches the right person", side: "right" },
    },
    {
      type: "cta-scene",
      durationInFrames: 120,
      content: { line: "Try it free", domain: "switchboard.app" },
    },
  ],
};

const ProductDemoScene = () => <A1ProductDemo config={config} />;

export const RemotionRoot = () => (
  <Composition
    id="ProductDemo"
    component={ProductDemoScene}
    durationInFrames={getProductDemoDuration(config)}
    fps={30}
    width={1920}
    height={1080}
  />
);
```

## Chapters

The clip runs 1356 frames at 30fps (45.2s). Scrub the preview to each act:

<PropsTable
  rows={[
    { name: "Problem hook", type: "0 to 165", description: "Your team has tasks everywhere, projects scattered, Meet Flowith" },
    { name: "Positioning", type: "165 to 285", description: "AI-Powered Work Operating System resolves to the Flowith lockup" },
    { name: "Icon cloud", type: "285 to 435", description: "App icons orbit Flowith has all your, then resolve to in one place" },
    { name: "AI planning", type: "435 to 555", description: "A day-timeline planning UI cranes in" },
    { name: "Workflow", type: "555 to 645", description: "A stage-by-stage workflow node graph with a yellow AI Layer" },
    { name: "Features swap", type: "645 to 720", description: "Features designed to simplify, organize, facilitate your workflow" },
    { name: "Task cards", type: "720 to 870", description: "A task checklist wires into animated task detail cards" },
    { name: "Focus chart", type: "870 to 975", description: "A Focus Time 4h 25m bar-chart card" },
    { name: "Integrations", type: "975 to 1050", description: "App integration icons pop in" },
    { name: "Metric cards", type: "1050 to 1140", description: "Three green gradient metric cards rise in" },
    { name: "Social proof", type: "1140 to 1260", description: "Join 12,000+ people with three testimonial cards" },
    { name: "Logo outro", type: "1260 to 1356", description: "The Flowith lockup holds" },
  ]}
/>

## Props

<PropsTable
  rows={[
    {
      name: "config",
      type: "ProductDemoConfig",
      default: "DEFAULT_PRODUCT_DEMO_CONFIG",
      description: "Typed scene config { meta, theme, scenes[] }. Falls back to the built-in Switchboard example.",
    },
    {
      name: "accentColor",
      type: "string",
      default: "\"#6366F1\"",
      description: "Accent used on the feature marker and CTA domain — overrides config.theme.accent",
    },
    {
      name: "background",
      type: "\"dynamic-grid\" | \"solid\"",
      default: "\"dynamic-grid\"",
      description: "Background on the hero and CTA beats. Feature beats always use a solid surface so the snapshot reads cleanly.",
    },
    {
      name: "theme",
      type: "\"light\" | \"dark\"",
      default: "\"dark\"",
      description: "Resolves the background, foreground, and muted tokens",
    },
    {
      name: "speed",
      type: "number",
      default: "1",
      description: "Multiplier for the per-scene animation timing",
    },
  ]}
/>

### Scene shape

Each entry in `config.scenes` is one of three typed scenes:

<PropsTable
  rows={[
    {
      name: "product-hero",
      type: "{ name, pitch, entrance? }",
      description: "Hero wordmark + one-line pitch. entrance is kinetic-center-build (default) or per-character-rise.",
    },
    {
      name: "feature-frame",
      type: "{ title, bullet, side }",
      description: "Editorial split. side is left or right and mirrors the layout between beats.",
    },
    {
      name: "cta-scene",
      type: "{ line, domain }",
      description: "Closing call-to-action line and domain",
    },
  ]}
/>
